title: AlfredEvalFixture
description: Schema for Alfred evaluation fixtures. Every file in evals/fixtures/*.json (except this file) must validate against this schema.

id.description: Unique fixture identifier, used in the eval report.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this fixture tests.

fixture_type.description: Determines which scorer function is used.

input.description: Input snapshot for the fixture. Shape depends on fixture_type.

mock_llm_response.description: Dict the mocked LLM provider returns. Null when the fixture requires no LLM call.

expected.description: Expected output fields checked by the scorer. Keys are scorer-specific boolean or string checks.

tolerance.description: Per-key comparison mode overrides (e.g. 'substring' for contains checks). Empty object uses exact match.
